top_signals.title: The US and China crave hegemony without responsibility
top_signals.summary: Beijing has yet to step forward to fill the leadership vacuum left by Washington
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Lower House passes bill to create disaster management agency
top_signals.summary: The bill is expected to be enacted during the current parliamentary session, with the government aiming to set up the agency this autumn.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
